title: Context Bundle
description: Governed, deterministic context bundle that represents the exact inputs provided to an AI task. All AI calls must flow through a context bundle.

context_id.description: Deterministic identifier derived from task_type and primary_input.

task_type.description: AI task type that will consume this bundle (e.g., 'meeting_minutes', 'gap_analysis').

primary_input.description: Primary input payload for the AI task. Always included regardless of budget constraints.

policy_constraints.description: Governing constraints and rules relevant to the task. Bounded by policy_constraint_reservation in the budget policy.

retrieved_context.description: Retrieved artifact fragments ordered by relevance. Subject to retrieval_reservation budget.

prior_artifacts.description: Prior artifacts (decisions, outputs) that provide historical context.

glossary_terms.description: Domain glossary entries to support consistent terminology.

unresolved_questions.description: Open questions included as context for the AI task.

metadata.description: Administrative metadata attached to the bundle.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this bundle was assembled.

retrieval_status.description: Indicates whether retrieved_context was populated from a retrieval system.

source_artifact_ids.description: Identifiers of all source artifacts contributing to this bundle.

token_estimates.description: Per-section token estimates used for budget enforcement.

truncation_log.description: Record of every truncation action applied to this bundle. Never silently empty when truncation occurred.

priority_order.description: Ordered list of sections present in the bundle, in canonical priority order.
